name: product_page_3_products_tea-seeper

observed_strengths.observation: Teaware PDP (Tea Infuser) positions itself as the entry accessory for new loose-leaf drinkers ('Brew Mindfully, Sip Calmly'), pairing naturally with the tea catalog
'Complete Your Ritual' cross-sell surfaces Tea Bags, Loose Leaf Samplers, Mug, and Tea Bag Samplers — strong attach path for a hardware item

missing_or_weak.observation: No reviews/ratings shown for the infuser, removing reassurance on a physical product where durability matters
No bundle pricing that pairs the infuser with a starter tea, despite the obvious 'teaware + tea' attach opportunity

purchase_path_notes: Accessory PDP funnels into consumable teas via the cross-sell row, but relies on a flat add-to-cart with no infuser+tea bundle incentive.
